interface.longDescription:
The Dupe ChatGPT app finds lookalikes you can actually afford. Drop in a product URL, upload an image, or tell us what you're after—we'll search the entire internet for similar items at better prices.

Perfect for deal hunters or anyone who wants the look without the markup. Fashion, furniture, home décor, you name it. Add the Dupe app and start saving. Why pay full price when you don't have to?
defaultPrompt: Find cheaper alternatives for this outdoor chair
